blockers.description: Org monthly spend-limit hit TWICE this session (once during 14-03, once during gsd-verifier); user reset it both times
blockers.workaround: Run post-completion audits one at a time; each spawns agents that spend. If the limit re-triggers, the phase artifacts are durable and committed -- resume the specific audit after reset. Do NOT retry in a loop.

decisions.decision: Phase 14 is COMPLETE + gsd-verifier PASSED 12/12 + committed (8130de0); is_last_phase of milestone lz-tdd@0.0.2
decisions.rationale: Full discuss->plan->execute->verify chain ran; 14-RESULTS.md verdict is unbiased-reviewer-confirmed and matches grading records

decisions.decision: Empirical verdict = differently-shaped work (not a skill win): lz-refactor cheaper/named/proportionality-guarded/FP-capable; code_review broader with off-axis bug+spec value; ~139-vs-12 vocabulary breadth is the idiom/pattern headline
decisions.rationale: Head-to-head vs a real external code-review skill, not just base Opus

decisions.decision: D-12 metered spend gate was explicitly user-approved (approve-3cell = 18 runs); never self-approved
Kata run command fixed: use --suite e2e-gilded-rose (NOT ../e2e-gilded-rose) from the workspace root; run-e2e.mjs:57 resolves --suite vs CWD
decisions.rationale: the plan's documented command assumed CWD=e2e-nx/; the deviation is recorded in 14-04-SUMMARY

uncommitted_files: .planning/config.json (carries workflow._auto_chain_active: true -- left uncommitted by design; the orchestrator's ephemeral chain flag)
next_action: Post-completion audits (secure + validate + extract-learnings) are DONE + committed (2026-07-15). Remaining: /gsd-audit-milestone lz-tdd@0.0.2 then /gsd-complete-milestone lz-tdd@0.0.2. Do NOT re-run any metered eval, re-execute phase-14 plans, or re-run the three completed audits -- all committed.
context_notes: Paused deliberately to move the mandatory post-completion audits (secure/validate/extract) into a fresh session: this session's context is very large and the org spend-limit hit twice, so running heavy audit agents here risked another mid-audit interruption. The audits are RETROACTIVE on the already-verified, committed phase -- they read existing artifacts, they do NOT re-run the 18 metered runs (those live in results/recommend/**/cr-*/ and are committed). _auto_chain_active is still true in config; running the audits as plain commands (not --auto) lets the workflows' 'sync chain flag with intent' step clear it.
